claim: Moving from 80% AI code + 20% human review to 100% AI code creates real acceleration; human review at 80% becomes the bottleneck that slows down all code and architecture decisions
actionable: When adopting AI coding agents, aim for 100% AI generation and review; at 80% you become the bottleneck and lose the speed advantage of AI automation
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Product management is now the bottleneck, not engineering; when software engineering is 10-100x faster via AI, the product feedback loop (decide what to build) becomes the limiting factor
actionable: Hire for or develop product thinking in engineering teams; when code generation is fast, time-to-decision on what to build becomes critical
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Future AI engineers need three skill clusters: (1) effective coding agent use (Cloud Code, Gemini AI, Copilot), (2) knowledge of available building blocks/APIs (continuously changing), (3) generalist skills (basic PM, design, legal awareness)
actionable: As an engineer, develop generalist skills beyond pure coding; learn enough product thinking and design to guide AI agents effectively; stay current on new APIs and tools
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Ratio of PMs to engineers trending toward 1:1 or even single generalist; small AI-native teams of 2-10 where engineers do PM work and PMs do engineering move fastest
actionable: Organize teams around generalist principles: hire people who can both code and think strategically about product; small cross-functional teams outpace traditional hierarchies
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Beyond product bottleneck: design, legal, marketing, and sales are now bottlenecks when engineering speed increased 10-100x; small teams with generalist skills across functions move faster
actionable: Build small teams where engineers can do basic marketing/sales; use AI to help with legal/compliance drafts; this eliminates downstream delays from specialized functions
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Context Hub tool provides coding agents up-to-date API documentation to prevent hallucination on deprecated APIs; older training data causes models to use outdated endpoints
actionable: Use Context Hub to inject current documentation into coding agent prompts; this prevents agents from defaulting to older API versions despite newer ones being available
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Code Dream is an interactive learning environment combining AI-driven video conversation with browser-based terminal for practicing coding agent workflows with current tools
actionable: Use Code Dream to learn modern AI coding agent workflows in an interactive sandbox; practice with current APIs and tools rather than outdated course materials
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering

claim: Building blocks (APIs, frameworks, tools) are proliferating faster than ever; staying current on available building blocks is a critical skill that beats pure algorithm knowledge
actionable: Invest time weekly in learning new tools and APIs; familiarity with building blocks is more valuable than deep algorithm knowledge in the AI coding era
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF: Andrew Ng: The Future of Software Engineering
